name: Inertia ball
short_description: This is an unusual adventure future simulation space game, in different gravity under your operation will also change. Players can feel the vastness of different planets in the game, feel different gravity, feel their own different operations. Conquer the universe!
detailed_description:
Inertia ball is a third-person adventure game where the ball is the main character.

The setting takes place in five atmospheric space environments, each with a different gravity and different challenges in different gravity

The game is full of challenging levels and items.

Race against time, at the end of the game includes the total time of all levels, I believe that players who are willing to challenge can continue to go fast
